title: Multiple-Testing Adjusted P-Values
objective: Control false-discovery risk in the exploratory feature-target screening table.
method: Applied Benjamini-Hochberg adjustment to the unadjusted p-values from the screening analysis.
results: 14 features remain significant at BH-adjusted q < 0.05.
Top adjusted feature is cp with q=9.85e-57.
warnings: Missing values and site-level sampling differences may affect all estimates.
